short_blurb: Historic-home and craftsman roofing specialists in Pasadena.
local_note: Pasadena's rich inventory of Craftsman bungalows, Spanish Colonial Revivals, and Mid-Century Moderns demands roofers who respect architectural detail. Many neighborhoods (Bungalow Heaven, Prospect, and others) are Landmark Districts with specific material and profile requirements. We work regularly with Pasadena Historic Preservation staff on compliant installs.
